sentence_reviews.text: Neural ODEs, controlled differential equations, and neural SDEs parameterize continuous-time dynamics and place numerical solvers inside the learned computation.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Chen et al. 2018, Neural Ordinary Differential Equations, abstract/method.
sentence_reviews.notes: Neural ODEs and differentiable ODE solvers are directly supported; CDEs and SDEs are not directly covered by the Neural ODE citation alone.

sentence_reviews.text: The role of Neural ODEs, CDEs & SDEs is to connect Differentiable ODE/PDE/SDE solvers, State-space transitions to downstream capabilities including Scientific ML, simulators & digital twins.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Chen et al. 2018 continuous-depth/state dynamics; PML time-series/state-space background.
sentence_reviews.notes: Continuous dynamics and solver dependencies are supported; scientific-ML/digital-twin downstream role is a reasonable synthesis.

sentence_reviews.text: substrate for Scientific ML, simulators & digital twins
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Chen et al. 2018 continuous-time dynamics framework.
sentence_reviews.notes: Continuous learned dynamics are relevant to scientific simulators, but digital twins are not directly named.

sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Chen et al. 2018 black-box ODE solver in neural network models.
sentence_reviews.notes: The Neural ODE method directly embeds ODE solvers in learned computation.

sentence_reviews.text: Its inductive bias, data demand, optimization behavior, and compute profile can make it unsuitable outside the regimes where it was validated. Its direct dependencies include Differentiable ODE/PDE/SDE solvers, State-space transitions.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Chen et al. 2018 solver-based modeling; PML state-space/time-series background.
sentence_reviews.notes: Dependencies are supported; broad limitation wording is generic.

sentence_reviews.text: Neural ODEs, CDEs & SDEs is assembled in part from the mechanism or model component Differentiable ODE/PDE/SDE solvers.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Chen et al. 2018 differentiable ODE solver and adjoint method.
sentence_reviews.notes: Directly supported for Neural ODEs; CDE/SDE extension is consistent with the combined node label.

sentence_reviews.text: Neural ODEs, CDEs & SDEs is assembled in part from the mechanism or model component State-space transitions.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Chen et al. 2018 continuous hidden-state dynamics; PML state-space modeling topics.
sentence_reviews.notes: Continuous-time hidden state evolution supports the state-transition dependency.

sentence_reviews.text: Neural ODEs, CDEs & SDEs consumes, emits, or organizes information using Sequences, events & time series.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Chen et al. 2018 time-series/continuous dynamics examples; PML time-series topics.
sentence_reviews.notes: Continuous-time modeling naturally handles time-indexed data; common strength is appropriate.

edge_reviews.notes: composes/core is directly supported for Neural ODEs.
composes/core is supported by continuous hidden-state dynamics.
represents_with/common is appropriate for continuous-time sequence/event modeling.
